codeReview.summary: This diff is evidence-only. The remediation credibly replaces the earlier unknown-model proxy with the real missing-provider path inside `ScoopContext.init()`, so the round-1 blocker about exercising the wrong code path is resolved. But the new evidence also shows the user-facing `agent` failure text would still be the generic `Agent not initialized`, so VAL-LIVE-010 is still not satisfied at the terminal surface.

issues.description: The new evidence artifact records `actualBridgeFinalText: "Agent not initialized"`, `match: "PARTIAL"`, and explicitly states that the `agent` supplemental command would therefore render `Agent not initialized\n` instead of a provider-identifying message (`.factory/validation/hardening/user-testing/flows/val-live-010.json:160-166`). That does prove the remediation exercised the missing-provider throw in `packages/webapp/src/scoops/scoop-context.ts:237-239`, but it also proves the user-facing VAL-LIVE-010 contract is still unmet. In the reviewed snapshot, non-zero `bridge.spawn()` results are written straight to terminal stderr by `packages/webapp/src/shell/supplemental-commands/agent-command.ts:274-286`, and the bridge still overwrites the earlier specific init failure with the later generic follow-up from `prompt()` (`packages/webapp/src/scoops/agent-bridge.ts:356-358` in commit `5233a3f^`).
issues.suggestedFix: Preserve the first specific `ScoopContext.init()` failure through `AgentBridge.spawn()` so the `agent` command prints `No API key configured for provider ...`, then rerun the fresh/no-provider live check and update the evidence.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `webapp-worker` still tells workers to type a representative `agent` invocation in the terminal and only documents the screenshot-timeout fallback; it does not mention the now-documented xterm keyboard-input fallback or the fresh/no-provider bootstrap procedure.
sharedStateObservations.rationale: The fix handoff had to justify a manual deviation for both points (`/Users/trieloff/.factory/missions/094c0314-6896-4f76-bf58-89b7dfee66f4/handoffs/2026-04-18T03-37-49-099Z__fix-hardening-fresh-profile-val-live-010__de5c4082-9cb8-472b-a03b-741daf4f1c91.json:10-12,140-141`), while `.factory/skills/webapp-worker/SKILL.md:116-123` still lacks that guidance and `.factory/library/user-testing.md:102-108` now documents it.

summary: Fail. The round-1 blocker is resolved in the narrow sense that this remediation exercised the real missing-provider path inside `ScoopContext.init()` instead of the unknown-model short-circuit. But the new evidence also shows the user-facing `agent` stderr would still be `Agent not initialized`, so VAL-LIVE-010 is still not fully satisfied.
